title: Flow of Control in a Python if Statement
description: A flowchart illustrating the decision-making process and execution flow of an if-elif-else statement in Python.
relationships: The flow starts at the first 'if' condition and checks for True/False. If True, it executes its code block and jumps to the end. If False, it proceeds to the next 'elif' condition. This process repeats until a condition is True. If no condition is True, the 'else' block executes. Finally, the program continues after the entire statement.
